examples: In the UK drinking water can contain no more than 100 micrograms of THM per litre. A microgram is one millionth of a gram.
The more-widely used 25-microgram patch is prescribe mainly for lower-weight patients, children and patients just starting on the medicine.
A single 15 microgram dose of swine flu vaccine is enough for kids 10 and older, while children under 10 will need two doses, 21 days apart.
